scenarios.notes: Low-damage early Act 1 deck should take efficient frontload over slower setup.
Known Underdocks elite pressure should bias the reward toward block.
Known Overgrowth elite pressure should bias the reward toward efficient damage.
Act 2 deck with no scaling should value a clear long-fight plan.
Bloated deck with low-fit offers should let Skip compete directly.

scenarios.source: Forbidden Grimoire empirical calibration: STS2.fun All Patches and main_v0.103_current reviews
scenarios.notes: Calibration guard: Forbidden Grimoire should not be over-picked when another offered card solves urgent frontload. This supports the current-patch prior calibration but does not claim Forbidden Grimoire is universally weak.

scenarios.source: Cold Snap empirical calibration: STS2.fun current-patch high-prior weak-empirical triage
scenarios.notes: Calibration guard: Cold Snap should not be over-picked in Act 2 when the deck already has a copy and another offered card solves the clearer scaling need.

scenarios.source: Astral Pulse empirical calibration: STS2.fun current-patch high-prior weak-empirical triage
scenarios.notes: Calibration guard: Astral Pulse should not be over-picked in Act 2 when the deck already has a copy and another offered card solves the clearer scaling need.

scenarios.source: Bulwark empirical calibration: STS2.fun current-patch high-prior weak-empirical triage
scenarios.notes: Calibration guard: Bulwark should not be over-picked when early Act 1 frontload is the clearer urgent need.
